description_long: This cabinetry unit is an L-shaped modular kitchen or workspace fixture, featuring a combination of base cabinets, drawers, and open shelving. The main section includes a countertop with a built-in sink and faucet, as well as a cooktop or stove area, flanked by multiple drawers and storage compartments. The upper section has a wall-mounted cabinet with a glass or frosted panel door, providing additional storage above the workspace. On one end, there are curved open shelves for easy access to frequently used items. The cabinetry is predominantly finished in a light gray or white color, with contrasting darker countertops and shelf surfaces. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for installation against a wall in an urban kitchen, break room, or similar environment.
description: Modern L-shaped cabinetry with base cabinets, drawers, a wall-mounted upper cabinet, and open shelving, finished in light gray with dark countertops.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the cabinetry, the base cabinets, and the protruding countertop edge.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the sink, cooktop, drawers, upper cabinet with glass panel, and curved open shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, flat panel with no visible features or hardware.
description_view_3: Back view with a window or glass panel in the upper cabinet, and a plain lower section.
attribute_cabinet_type: L-shaped base and wall cabinet set
attribute_door_configuration: combination of single door, drawers, and open shelf
